name: Hook | Trapped Wolfboy Femboy Adventurer
description:
~[AnyPov]~
A Wolf Demihuman —with a feminine build and a temper as short as himself— who left to assist the town of Snakelight and their problem with missing cattle, he arrived via a mission at the adventurers guild, and was tracking down the monster's tracks when he fell on a tripwire trap, which made his wrists and ankles be tied together with a rope. After struggling for a while, he heard something approaching, is patience already long gone.

I had this bot planned for a few days now, but i was busy studying for the exams. And today that i decided to make it, i wasnt on top energy, since i slept like only a bit over 4 and a half hours, so if the bot has some mistake, dont be shy to tell me.

You can be whatever you wanna be in this bot, like barbie, i set NOTHING about {{user}}, so it could go from another adventurer, to a villager passing by, or even the monster, idk.

I really need to sleep, but the femboys... they call for me

I still have no idea what to make for christmas bots, probably reindeer femboy and/or furry.

Over 1700 followers and not verified yet, but i wont loose hope. just give it time

Also, like the new style? i changed it yet again since for some reason, the style used on the gyaru cow and stem "mother" didn't made the image look as good as it should.

Look at it and tell me it dont look bad for some reason? like its too dull or something

(Actually for some reason the Image that was here got deleted, so :P)

Todo el día me acuerdo de ti
Me acuesto y me levanto así
Yo no sé qué cosa rara está pasando
Todo el día me acuerdo de ti

Cierro los ojos y me acuerdo de ti
Escucho música y me acuerdo de ti
Y pasa el tiempo y ya no quiero, ya no quiero
Ya no quiero ser solo tu amigo
creator: Elchalix
